title: Pegasus Optimize
description:
Lightweight modpack of optimizations and quality of life for NeoForge!
(Compatibility with Fabric mods)
body:
# ![Pegasus Optimize](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fba0ca224778834e29dfdf98db29049c8649a54.jpeg)
### Pegasus Optimize is a minecraft modpack that aims to be lightweight and use the most current versions of mods and look for better alternatives to the old ones!
**(Use the modpack as a base for your needs.)**

The modpack has almost full support for Fabtic mods (with some exceptions).
And also the modpack performs its task of optimizations quite well! Even with my weak laptop, I can afford to play 32 chunks or with Distant Horizon! **Screenshots in the gallerie**.

## Known incompatible mods

<details>
<summary>Mods list</summary>
  
### (Previously, there were more mods in this list, but most of them have been moved to the “Popular compatible Fabric mods” section)
- [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)

</details>

## Popular compatible Fabric mods

<details>
<summary>Mods list</summary>

- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback)
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom)
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) (**Now it works fine if you add** [**CITResewnNeoPatcher**](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn-neopatcher) to the modpack! Without it, **CIT Resewn** simply won't work.)
- [~~Continuity~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) (I recommend using [NeoContinuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/neocontinuity).)
- [Mine Little Pony](https://modrinth.com/mod/mine-little-pony/version/GJNgjgr7)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [~~Litematica~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/litematica) (I did not check if it works, but it is not necessary because there is a high quality fork called [Forgematica](https://modrinth.com/mod/forgematica). I use it myself.)
- [~~Language Reload~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) (And there is a Neoforge fork that works well too! [LanguageReloadUnofficial](https://modrinth.com/mod/languagereloadunofficial).)
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Skin Shuffle](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinshuffle)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin/version/1.12.2+kotlin.2.0.20) (If Fabric mods require **Fabric Language Kotlin**, then the Language Kotlin api for NeoForge is not suitable for it!)
- [Very Many Players (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/vmp-fabric)

</details>

**If a mod is not in any of the lists, either I haven't tested it yet, or it is officially supported by Neoforge!**⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀⠀
(Over the past year, we had to remove a lot of mods from the lists because they received official support.)
